plan.content:
I have created a detailed work plan to research and gather information on the information gathering phase of web application pentesting. The plan includes the following actionable steps:

1. Identify and list common techniques used in the information gathering phase of web application pentesting.
2. Research and compile a list of tools commonly used for information gathering in web application pentesting.
3. Gather detailed evidence and data points on each technique and tool identified, including their effectiveness and use cases.
4. Organize findings into a structured format for analysis and reporting.
5. Prepare a summary report of the findings with references to sources used.

This plan will guide the research and analysis process effectively.
